Rejected strength-training, injury-prevention, interview, Alpe Adria, Alps2Sea, and Soriska planina channel entries as weak or non-course imagery for this 120K atlas. Direct per-video metadata/frame extraction for the final-section course preview still returned the YouTube bot/sign-in challenge, so true frame extraction remains unresolved.

result: Read-only adversarial audit confirmed LR112 and LR113 are useful nonduplicate additions and identified three still-missing public same-area sources. Integrated LR114 Exploring Slovenia Dovska Baba spring-flower article, LR115 Skrite Poti Dovska Rozca MTB/gallery page, and CM017 Commons Dovska Baba Mlinca. Confirmed Siol LR052, Naprostem LR039, Slotrips LR043, Gorenjski glas LR064, Medves LR053, CM015 Rozca, Spirito/Kingrunner/Mountain-race/UTMB Live/JAT Adventures are already cataloged. AllTrails Hruski vrh remains HTTP 403/DataDome; Bergwelten winter Dovska Baba, Triglav Trail Run holidays, and Red Bull broad Julian Alps imagery were treated as low-value overlap.

query: UTMB Live non-finish public API probe
result: Deepened the public UTMB Live API probe after PG073 by querying /event-context, /races/JAT120K, /races/JAT120K/static, /races/JAT120K/map, /races/JAT120K/progressive, /races/JAT120K/categories, /races/JAT120K/withdraws, and sampled /runners/{bib}/photos plus /runners/{bib}/livecam for bibs 1000-1700. The public endpoints exposed duplicate official logos/banners, the track JSON/profile/map/progress data, empty runner-photo responses, and no sampled non-point-100 livecam images; no new non-finish public image URLs were found. This strengthens the bounded UTMB public-API exhaustion claim but does not prove authorized browser-only media or private runner-detail surfaces are exhausted.

query: Blocked local/user-gallery recovery pass
result: Re-tested source-only local/gallery candidates LR035, LR036, LR073, LR075, LR083, LR094, and LR095. LR073 and LR083 direct Wikiloc page/CDN access still returned 403, but r.jina route-page mirrors exposed route-photo CDN URLs that validate through the public image proxy; integrated five Kupljenik-Babji zob photos and ten Planina pod Golico-Betel-Golica photos with route-localization caveats. LR075 ClimbTriglav Babji zob now exposes public WordPress route images directly; integrated five article photos while filtering logos, icons, and related-tour thumbnails. LR095 cached Bergfex HTML exposed twelve route-page user-photo profile/detail JPEGs, all validated and integrated. LR035 Kranjska-Gora D-2 still exposes text but no simple image URLs, LR036 Wikiloc was still CAPTCHA/403-limited in that pass, and LR094 Iglu Sport remains CAPTCHA/403-limited; broader local/activity-platform gallery exhaustion therefore remains bounded rather than absolute.

result: Re-probed the remaining source-only public/local candidates PG016, PG068, PG063, LR035, LR036, LR044, and LR094 using direct HTML, r.jina mirrors, and public image-proxy validation. Integrated one PG016 Kranjska Gora JAT event hero image exposed by the r.jina mirror and four LR036 Wikiloc Kranjska Gora-Mojstrana route photos exposed by the double r.jina mirror and validated through images.weserv.nl. query: PG003 official media-shell image recovery audit
result: Re-probed the official media page PG003 after adversarial review. Direct public HTML and r.jina mirrors expose a noisy UTMB page shell with global event-menu imagery, logos, partners, blurred placeholders, and three full-size /julianalps/Media/ Cloudinary file paths. A later semantic filename audit identified those files as 100_Miles_by_UTMB / 100_milja_istre shell media rather than JAT course imagery, so the builder now filters them and keeps PG003 as source-only while preserving the external press-room/media-kit flow as terms/approval-gated and not harvested.
